name: Zenhub
description: Zenhub — GitHub-native project management tool with Kanban boards, sprints, and roadmaps embedded inside GitHub.

seo.title: Zenhub — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Zenhub: Zenhub — GitHub-native project management tool with Kanban boards, sprints, and roadmaps embedded inside GitHub.

when_to_use: GitHub-native Kanban boards without leaving GitHub
Sprint planning and velocity tracking inside GitHub
Roadmap visualization linked to GitHub milestones
Multi-repo Epics connecting issues across repositories

pros: Kanban and sprints embedded directly in GitHub issues
Good reports tied to actual commit/PR data
cons: Occasional sync issues with GitHub state
Weaker for non-engineering teams than Linear or Jira
Lock-in once the company leans on it
review.verdict: The strongest 'PM inside GitHub' tool, best when your whole org actually lives in GitHub issues.
review.best_for: Engineering-led orgs that want PM on top of GitHub without moving to Jira or Linear.
review.not_for: Orgs with heavy non-engineering PM needs or already standardized on Linear/Jira.
